title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: AIADMK facing its biggest test in 53 years
description: In nine years since becoming the party’s pivotal figure in February 2019, Mr. Palaniswami has only two instances of saving grace: his ability to retain power by winning in nine Assembly constituencies out of 22 which had by-polls during April-May 2019, and the party’s victory in two by-polls in Nanguneri and Virkavandi later that year
